lines.text: Under the bun
under the moon Drums in the jungle
hearts in two
River is singing smoke in the sky
Ohm in the breath let the ego
die Fire under the banyan tree Light
in you and light in me Karma
move like a river deep Dharma awake
from the village sleep Ohm we rise
with the morning sun Many names but
the light is one Shiva dance and
the drums go wild Krishna smiles in
the forest child
Bare feet walk where the red dust
glows Cow bells ring where the warm
wind blows Ganga calls through the mountain
stone Every soul finds its way back
home Ganesha clear every tone from the
road Lakshmi bless where the brain is
sewn Saraswati in the song we know
Hanuman strength when the storm winds blow
I see Brahman in the flame and
rain Atman shining through joy and pain
Maya moves like a painted veil Truth
still lives where the wise hearts sail
Beat that drum let the night unfold
Old gods whisper through the leaves of
gold No more fear no more shame
to hold Dust becomes diamonds when the
spirit is bold Fire under the banyan
tree Light in you and light in
me Karma move like a river deep
Dharma awake from the village sleep Ohm
we rise with the morning sun Many
names but the light is one Shiva
dance and the drums go wild Krishna
smiles in the forest child
In the jungle where the peacocks cry
Monsoon drums on the temple tile Grandma
tells what the sage is so Life
is love under cosmic law Ram walked
truth through the burning land Sita held
stars in her gentle hand Arjuna shook
with the war inside Krishna said stand
in the self don't hide Do your
work let the fruit go free Serve
the world let the heart be clean
Ahimsa breath compassion seed Feed every soul
give every need Who are we Light
and play Where do we go Home
one day What do we see Truth
not gold What do we bring Love
to hold Dharma in the dirt Karma
in the rain Moksha in the fire
Burning through the chain Devi in the
mother Shiva in the sky Krishna in
the laughter Brahma never dies Fire under
the banyan tree Light in you and
light in me Karma move like a
river deep Dharma awake from the village
sleep Om we rise with the morning
sun Many names but the light is
one Shiva dance and the drums go
wild Krishna smiles In the forest child
Under the banyan Under the banyan under
the moon Drums in the jungle under
the moon Drums in the jungle hearts
in tune River is singing smoke in
the sky Om in the breath Let
the ego die
